member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.CustomTimeZoneEnricher
member.summary: Enriches log events with timestamps converted to a specific time zone.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.CustomTimeZoneEnricher.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The time zone identifier to use for timestamp conversion.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.CustomTimeZoneEnricher.Enrich(Serilog.Events.LogEvent,Serilog.Core.ILogEventPropertyFactory)
member.summary: Enriches the log event with a custom timestamp property converted to the configured time zone.
member.param: The factory used to create the property.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for logging functionality.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.EnableLocalFile
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether local file logging is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.Buffered
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether buffered writing is enabled for file logging.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.Shared
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether shared file access is enabled. Can be set to true when Buffered is false.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.LocalFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the local file path for log files.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.RollingInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the rolling interval for log files (e.g., Day, Hour).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.RetainedFileCountLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of retained log files. Null indicates no limit.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.FileSizeLimitBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum file size in bytes before rolling. Null indicates no limit.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.Formatter
member.summary: Gets or sets the log formatter type (Plain or Json).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.OutputTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the output template for log messages.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.EnableDatabaseLogging
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether database logging is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.DatabaseConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the database connection string for logging.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.EnableElasticsearchLogging
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Elasticsearch logging is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.ElasticsearchUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the Elasticsearch URL.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.ElasticsearchIndexFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the index format for Elasticsearch logs.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.ElasticsearchUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the username for Elasticsearch authentication.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.ElasticsearchPassword
member.summary: Gets or sets the password for Elasticsearch authentication.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.LoggingOptions.TimeZoneId
member.summary: Gets or sets the time zone ID for logging timestamps. Default is UTC.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for OpenTelemetry observability (tracing, metrics, and logging). OTLP export is configured once at root via , , and . When no Dynatrace exporter is active, a single UseOtlpExporter call covers all three signals. Sub-sections (, ) control instrumentation and per-backend exporters only.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether OpenTelemetry is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.ServiceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the service name for telemetry identification.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.ServiceVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the service version for telemetry identification.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.ServiceNamespace
member.summary: Gets or sets the service namespace for logical grouping.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.OtlpEndpoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the OTLP endpoint URL for all signals (traces, metrics, and logs). Examples: http://localhost:4317 (gRPC) or http://localhost:4318 (HTTP/protobuf).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.OtlpProtocol
member.summary: Gets or sets the OTLP transport protocol for all signals. Accepted values: grpc (default) or http.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.EnableOtlpExporter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to enable OTLP export for all signals (traces, metrics, and logs). When Dynatrace is not configured, UseOtlpExporter is used — one call covering all signals. When Dynatrace is configured, per-signal AddOtlpExporter is used instead (they cannot coexist).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.Tracing
member.summary: Gets or sets tracing configuration.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.Metrics
member.summary: Gets or sets metrics configuration.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions.Logging
member.summary: Gets or sets logging configuration for OpenTelemetry.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for distributed tracing.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether tracing is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.EnableAspNetCoreInstrumentation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether ASP.NET Core instrumentation is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.EnableHttpClientInstrumentation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether HTTP client instrumentation is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.EnableSqlClientInstrumentation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether SQL Client instrumentation is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.EnableConsoleExporter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether console exporter is enabled (for development).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.EnableDynatraceExporter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Dynatrace exporter is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.DynatraceEndpoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dynatrace OTLP endpoint URL (e.g., https://{your-environment-id}.live.dynatrace.com/api/v2/otlp/v1/traces).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.DynatraceApiToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dynatrace API token for authentication.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.TracingOptions.AdditionalSources
member.summary: Gets or sets additional activity sources to include in tracing.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for metrics collection.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether metrics are enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.EnableAspNetCoreInstrumentation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether ASP.NET Core instrumentation is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.EnableHttpClientInstrumentation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether HTTP client instrumentation is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.EnableRuntimeInstrumentation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether runtime instrumentation is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.EnableConsoleExporter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether console exporter is enabled (for development).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.EnableDynatraceExporter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Dynatrace exporter is enabled.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.DynatraceEndpoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dynatrace OTLP endpoint URL (e.g., https://{your-environment-id}.live.dynatrace.com/api/v2/otlp/v1/metrics).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.DynatraceApiToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dynatrace API token for authentication.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsOptions.AdditionalMeters
member.summary: Gets or sets additional meters to include in metrics collection.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.OTelLoggingOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for OpenTelemetry logging integration. OTLP logging export is handled globally via . Use this class only for Dynatrace-specific logging configuration.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OTelLoggingOptions.EnableDynatraceExporter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Dynatrace exporter is enabled for logs.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OTelLoggingOptions.DynatraceEndpoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dynatrace OTLP endpoint URL (e.g., https://{your-environment-id}.live.dynatrace.com/api/v2/otlp/v1/logs).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Logging.OTelLoggingOptions.DynatraceApiToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dynatrace API token for authentication.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.TracingHelper
member.summary: Example helper class demonstrating how to use ActivitySource for distributed tracing. This class can be injected via DI and used throughout your application.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.TracingHelper.#ctor(System.Diagnostics.ActivitySource)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The activity source for creating traces.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.TracingHelper.StartActivity(System.String,System.Diagnostics.ActivityKind)
member.summary: Creates a new activity (span) for tracing.
member.returns: The created activity, or null if tracing is disabled.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.TracingHelper.AddTag(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a tag to the current activity if one is active.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.TracingHelper.RecordException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Records an exception in the current activity.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.TracingHelper.AddEvent(System.String)
member.summary: Adds an event to the current activity.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsHelper
member.summary: Example helper class demonstrating how to use Meter for custom metrics. This class can be injected via DI and used throughout your application.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsHelper.#ctor(System.Diagnostics.Metrics.Meter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsHelper.CreateCounter``1(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a counter metric for tracking counts.
member.typeparam: The numeric type of the counter.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsHelper.CreateHistogram``1(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a histogram metric for tracking value distributions.
member.typeparam: The numeric type of the histogram.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsHelper.CreateObservableGauge``1(System.String,System.Func{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an observable gauge for tracking current values.
member.typeparam: The numeric type of the gauge.
member.param: The function to observe the current value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.MetricsHelper.CreateUpDownCounter``1(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an up-down counter for values that can increase or decrease.
member.typeparam: The numeric type of the counter.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring OpenTelemetry observability (tracing, metrics, and logging).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.AddAdvancedOpenTelemetry(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures OpenTelemetry tracing, metrics, and logging with the specified options.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.ConfigureTracing(OpenTelemetry.Trace.TracerProviderBuilder,Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions,OpenTelemetry.Resources.ResourceBuilder,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.ConfigureMetrics(OpenTelemetry.Metrics.MeterProviderBuilder,Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions,OpenTelemetry.Resources.ResourceBuilder,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures metrics collection with OpenTelemetry.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.ConfigureLogging(OpenTelemetry.Logs.LoggerProviderBuilder,Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryOptions)
member.summary: Configures OpenTelemetry log export.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.GetServiceNameFromAssembly
member.summary: Gets the service name from the entry assembly.
member.returns: The service name derived from the assembly name.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.GetServiceVersionFromAssembly
member.summary: Gets the service version from the entry assembly.
member.returns: The service version from the assembly version.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.AddActivitySource(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers an ActivitySource for distributed tracing in the application.
member.param: The name of the activity source (typically the service name).
The version of the activity source.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.OpenTelemetryExtensions.AddMeter(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a Meter for metrics collection in the application.
member.param: The name of the meter (typically the service name).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Logging.SerilogExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring advanced Serilog logging with multiple sinks including console, file, database, and Elasticsearch.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.SerilogExtensions.ConfigureAdvancedLogger(Serilog.LoggerConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the Serilog logger with advanced logging options including console, file, database, and Elasticsearch sinks.
member.param: The Serilog logger configuration to extend.
The application configuration containing logging settings.
The current environment name (e.g., Development, Production).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Logging.SerilogExtensions.AddAdvancedLoggingOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers the advanced logging options in the dependency injection container.
member.param: The service collection to add the logging options to.
The application configuration containing logging settings.
